settings.gg-cjAYongE_text: Your skin has more than one need — that’s why we created a collection of masks for hydration, firming, anti-wrinkle, and radiance. Many of our customers mix and match masks throughout the week for complete care.
settings.gg1KWrL-WzD_text: Your mask works best on clean, dry skin. Gently cleanse and pat dry to create the perfect base. This allows the collagen and hyaluronic acid to penetrate deeply without any barriers.

settings.gfTC_331ERb_text: Absolutely! We highly recommend it. For example, use our Bio-Collagen mask for deep hydration on Sunday, and our Vitamin C Radiance mask mid-week for a brightening boost. It’s the best way to give your skin everything it needs.
settings.gg-EoMCmSgW_text: Yes, the Nifora bio-collagen mask can be used in your existing skincare routine. However, we recommend testing new products on a small patch of skin to ensure they are suitable for your skin.
settings.gg4JkvcRc4w_text: You’re absolutely right — collagen is produced naturally in the body, but production slows with age. Our mask uses hydrolyzed marine collagen, which is broken down into smaller peptides that are better able to absorb into the upper layers of the skin. It’s not about replacing collagen deep inside — it’s about supporting the skin’s structure, hydration, and visible bounce from the outside in.
settings.gg5QaaKiVJj_text: No, it is not necessary to wash your face after use. The remaining serum can be gently massaged into the skin for extra hydration.
settings.ggAtGlddbip_text: Each pack comes with 4 masks. Each mask is single use. We recommend starting with 2 masks per week for a month in order to get your skin glowing fast and rejuvenated. After the first month, you can use one mask per week to maintain a healthy skin.
settings.ggJYFQPj7dj_text:
Processing Time: Once your order is placed, please allow 1 business day for us to process and prepare your order for shipment.

Shipping Time: After your order is dispatched, it will typically take 3-5 business days to reach you, depending on your location.

Tracking Information: Once your order has been shipped, you will receive an email containing your tracking number. You can use this to track your package and stay updated on its delivery status.
settings.ggKOJHDnWof_text: For best adherence, we recommend applying the mask to freshly cleansed, slightly damp skin. Take a moment to smooth it out gently, pressing down around the contours of your face. If needed, you can lay back and relax while it works its magic — the extra time also allows for deeper absorption. Some slip is natural due to the serum-rich formula, but that’s part of what makes it so effective at delivering moisture.
settings.ggR3t3c7BTY_text: Yes, we offer a 100% money-back guarantee. If you don’t notice healthier skin, we’ll give you a full refund. Plus, enjoy our 60-day risk-free guarantee for peace of mind.
settings.ggTmvsFWgsN_text:
🧴 Evening Routine: Cleanse and tone your face, ensuring your skin is free from oil and creams.

 

🎭 Application: Start with the bottom piece, followed by the top. Gently press for optimal adherence. Pro tip: Tilt your head back for a perfect fit.

 

⏳ Duration:

 

Express Glow: 1-2 hours

 

Maximum Results: Leave it on overnight (ensure it’s fully dry to prevent shifting).

 

💖 The Reveal: Gently remove the mask and pat the remaining essence into your skin. Pro tip: Use excess serum on your neck and décolleté.
settings.ggi7PaIz2q-_text: Designed to be gentle on the skin. Our mask does not strip moisture or dry out, making it ideal for all skin types.
settings.gglkOtUz4yY_text:
We’re proud to say our mask is cruelty-free — absolutely no animal testing is involved at any stage of formulation or production.

 

While it does contain hydrolyzed collagen, which is not plant-derived, we source it responsibly from marine ingredients. We know terms like “vegan collagen” can be confusing — and while some plant-based ingredients can help support collagen production, true collagen itself can only come from fish-based sources.

 

That said, we’re always exploring more sustainable innovations while staying committed to delivering results — and kindness — through skincare.
settings.ggmsse_m7JD_text: We don’t recommend reusing the mask. It’s designed as a single-use treatment to maintain hygiene and ensure maximum potency of the ingredients. Once used, the mask has already released most of its actives into your skin.
settings.ggqNJ6BYFRR_text:
Not at all! The mask is designed to move with you — most of our customers wear it while winding down for the night, whether that’s reading, watching TV, or getting ready for bed.

 

In fact, 78% of users wear the mask while they sleep, and many report up to 24% better hydration and visible skin smoothness when used overnight. The longer it stays on, the more time your skin has to soak in the benefits — all while you rest.

settings.ggvvY4AeUEN_text:
Use the mask 1-2 times per week for the best results. Regular use will maximize the benefits of firming, hydration, and brightening.

Leave the mask on for at least 60 minutes, but preferably 3-4 hours. The mask gradually becomes transparent, indicating that the nutrients are being absorbed.

 

For the best results, use it as a sleeping mask overnight. It does not leave any residue on your pillow.
settings.ggwltw_cQZy_text: You’ll typically notice immediate hydration and visible plumpness right after use. With weekly application, many customers see more long-term improvements in firmness and glow. Think of it as part of your ongoing skincare ritual, not just a one-time fix.
settings.ggyJVTCj59w_text:
Our Bio-Collagen Mask is formulated with skin-supportive ingredients designed to deliver deep hydration and visible firmness. Key ingredients include:

  • Hydrolyzed fish collagen (from salmon) – known for its smaller molecular size, making it easier for the skin to absorb. It helps support elasticity, smoothness, and firmness, especially in aging or dehydrated skin.
     
  • Niacinamide – helps brighten skin and even out tone.
     
  • Hyaluronic acid – provides intense, long-lasting hydration and plumping.
     
  • Peptides – support collagen production and improve overall skin resilience.
     

The mask’s hydrogel base allows for slow-release absorption, helping the skin drink in every ingredient — not just sit on the surface.
settings.gzpdQTHjCqz_text: For best results, we recommend using it 1-2 times per week to maintain optimal hydration and glow.
